time where left them eating, they gone.

thank now, Lord, recent blessings have received blessings come because know done with yet.
Jesus name, pray.
Amen."

Today went Alice Through Looking Glass with family.

Based non-spoiler movie review beforehand, rumor heard about this movie, with high expectations.

order must pass through fantastic adventure while learning lesson along way.

thought that they fantastic casting that role.

couldn't stop analyzing make-up done some Wonderland characters (the real ones, course, digitally-created ones).
make-up academy-award level.
since story didn't interest very much, found myself wondering many hours Johnny Depp spent front mirror being done make-up artist.
found other, similar minutiae more interesting than movie itself.
movie itself, whole, found rather bland, sterile, void creative impulse.
didn't find Hatter very mad, crazy.
movie entirety lacked Wonderland mystique being fantastical, illogical realm.
Most characters acted quite normal.
Even party redux didn't strike very strange.
found myself mentally comparing Wizard recent movie sequel this one: Alice just Dorothy, Queen Hearts just Wicked Witch West, Time just (well, almost) Wizard
realize this last comparison stretch.)
Wonderland just land
wouldn't difficult task screen-writer translate Alice Through Looking Glass into terms.

sure where you're getting your information from.
recently Cinderella Jungle Book, both were well-done.

cast decent enough first one, storyline wasn't great.

course they going capitalize properties that already exist, think you're being hasty writing them principle.
